overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along a dirt trail through grassy countryside during golden hour. A deer suddenly crosses the path and knocks the character down, who then recovers and continues walking toward a sunlit meadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy countryside trail with scattered trees

events.description: deer runs across the path from right to left, colliding with the character

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through open grassland

notable_agents.action: deer running across the path from right to left at high speed

entered.detail: reddish-brown dirt path winding through green grass
tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the meadow
deciduous trees with full green canopies on the right side
rolling green grassland extending into the distance
hazy mountains visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt trail through open countryside during golden hour. Tall pine trees line the left side while oak trees dot the right. At approximately 2.5 seconds, a deer suddenly runs across the path from right to left, colliding with the character.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy area beside the trail where the character fell

events.description: character falls to the ground after collision with deer
character pushes themselves up from the ground and stands

agents.ego_description: lying on the ground after being knocked down, then pushing up to a sitting position and standing

segments.scene_description: The character is on the ground in the grass beside the trail, recovering from the collision with the deer. The camera shows the character pushing up from a prone position to sitting, then standing back up. The surrounding grass and nearby pine trees remain visible as the character recovers.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit meadow trail approaching golden hour sunset

events.description: character turns left at a fork in the trail, choosing the left path

agents.ego_description: walking along the trail toward a sunlit meadow, turning left at a path intersection, and continuing uphill toward the golden light

entered.detail: bright golden sunlit meadow visible ahead on the hilltop

segments.scene_description: The character resumes walking along the dirt trail, now heading toward a brightly lit meadow. Around 16 seconds, the trail splits and the character takes the left fork. The lighting becomes increasingly golden and backlit as the character approaches the sunlit hilltop, with the surrounding grass taking on warm amber tones.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural trail that shifts from a sudden moment of chaos to a serene, sun-drenched walk. It begins with the character traversing a winding dirt path lined with pine and oak trees during the golden hour, until a deer suddenly darts across the trail and knocks the character to the ground. As the character recovers, the camera lingers on the surrounding grass and pines while they push themselves up from a prone position to a stand. The scene then shifts back to the journey as the character resumes walking, eventually reaching a fork in the road and taking the left path. Finally, the environment opens up into a brightly lit meadow, with the lighting becoming increasingly golden and backlit as the character ascends toward a sunlit hilltop of amber grass.
